message: remove TypeScript variant and align commented/minified sources

files.patch:
@@ -1,15 +0,0 @@
-{
-  "compilerOptions": {
-    "target": "ES2022",
-    "module": "ESNext",
-    "moduleResolution": "node",
-    "outDir": "./dist",
-    "rootDir": "./src",
-    "strict": true,
-    "esModuleInterop": true,
-    "skipLibCheck": true,
-    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true
-  },
-  "include": ["src/**/*"],
-  "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist"]
-}
\ No newline at end of file
